summary: Exceptional outdoor audience recording with crystal‑clear sound, capturing standout versions of Dupree’s Diamond Blues, Big River and Eyes of the World.
review: These recordings are widely praised for their astonishingly accurate and vivid audience capture—so clear it feels like standing in the vortex of the venue. The band delivered strong performances, with particularly impressive renditions of Dupree’s Diamond Blues, Big River and Eyes of the World. A handful of listeners note a slight boxy, bass‑light character, but overall the audio quality is superb.

ai_rating.rationale: All six reviews are highly favorable, highlighting both an excellent audience recording and strong musical performance; minor tonal quirks do not detract from the overall excellence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as crystal‑clear, accurate, and “too good” sounding; one reviewer mentions a slight boxy, bass‑less quality but overall the mix is superb.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers note that the band was in top form both days, delivering a consistently strong set with memorable performances and no reported lulls.
